name: GrowPost Monthly Publisher
job_to_be_done: Draft owner-approved social posts and publish them through GrowPost.
short_description: Create a safe post draft, ask for approval, and publish via GrowPost.

manifest.name: GrowPost Monthly Publisher
manifest.job_to_be_done: Draft owner-approved social posts and publish them through GrowPost.
manifest.short_description: Create a safe post draft, ask for approval, and publish via GrowPost.

tool_manual.job_to_be_done: Draft owner-approved social posts and publish them through GrowPost after the owner reviews the dry-run preview.
tool_manual.summary_for_model: Creates a GrowPost post draft from owner-provided intent, returns approval fields, and publishes only after an action approval.
trigger_conditions: owner asks the agent to draft and publish a short social post through GrowPost
agent has enough campaign context and needs an approval-gated publishing tool
request is to create a publishable post draft with a clear destination account
do_not_use_when: the owner only wants writing suggestions without using GrowPost
the target connected GrowPost account is missing or not authorized
the post contains regulated, illegal, or policy-unsafe content

topic.description: Topic or campaign brief for the post.

tone.description: Desired writing tone, such as concise, friendly, or launch.

dry_run.description: Set true for runtime validation and owner preview calls.

summary.description: One-line description of the draft or publish result.

status.description: Current GrowPost status, such as drafted or published.

postText.description: Post text shown to the owner for approval.

draftToken.description: Opaque token for publishing the approved draft.

usage_hints: Use dry_run first and show postText to the owner before requesting approval.
Do not publish if the owner changes the topic after the draftToken was created.
result_hints: Show status, postText, and dailyLimit so the owner understands what will happen.
If status is published, include the final summary and any receipt identifier returned by the runtime.
error_hints: If GrowPost rejects the draft, show the response body and ask the owner to revise the topic.
If dailyLimit is exhausted, tell the owner when they can retry.
tool_manual.side_effect_summary: Publishes a social post through the owner's connected GrowPost account after approval.

request_payload.topic: Launch note for a new agent workflow

i18n.job_to_be_done_en: Draft owner-approved social posts and publish them through GrowPost.
i18n.job_to_be_done_ja: オーナー承認済みのSNS投稿案を作成し、GrowPost経由で公開します。
i18n.short_description_en: Create a safe post draft, ask for approval, and publish via GrowPost.
i18n.short_description_ja: 安全な投稿案を作成し、承認後にGrowPostで公開します。
